title: Better Gold
description: Changes the original Minecraft gold textures to be more vibrant and realistic!
body:
Gold.
Minecraft has had it for a long time.
Honestly, the textures for it has been all over the place. When it first came out, it was bright yellow that faded to olive green for some reason. Now its yellow with white shine, and more realistic shading.
But that's not good enough!
I've tried to make gold into something that I would really like, so hopfully you guys like it, too!
